summary: Tested Action Flow simplification: Step 1 (Need) entry message + single insight card, Step 3 (Action) simplified with no category pills and optional description. All 13 tests passed including full flow completion and regression tests.
critical_code_review_comments: ActionFlow.js correctly implements simplified Need step with entry-msg + single insight card
Entry message logic: isFirstTime check uses baseline.public_actions === 0 && baseline.private_actions === 0
First-time users see: 'Post one action to see how the system works.'
Returning users see: 'One action moves your position.'
Single insight card uses orientation.message or falls back to position/visibility string
Status dot color comes from baseline.status.color
Action step has no category pills (.flow-category-row removed from DOM)
Publish button enabled with title only (no description required)
Category defaults to 'community' in form state
Back button visible on steps 1-2 only (correct per requirements)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with 28 actions (returning user scenario)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Action Flow simplification tested successfully. Key test results: 1) Entry message data-testid='flow-entry-msg' shows returning user message for users with actions, 2) Single insight card data-testid='flow-need-insight' with status dot (.flow-need-status-dot), 3) Old .flow-need-grid NOT in DOM, 4) Action step has title input + optional description textarea, 5) No .flow-category-row in DOM, 6) Publish enabled with title only. Full flow Need→Choice→Action→Reaction→Result→Reward completes successfully.
